controlPlane.summary: One or more non-blocking warnings were detected. The upgrade to 1.31.0 is expected to succeed, but review the warnings before proceeding. Learn more: https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/aks/upgradeinsights

detectedIssues.message: A PodDisruptionBudget allows zero voluntary disruptions, which may slow node drain but is not expected to block the upgrade.

recommendedAction.title: Relax the PodDisruptionBudget
recommendedAction.details: Set maxUnavailable to at least 1 (or reduce minAvailable) so nodes can drain smoothly during the upgrade.

title: Evaluate Upgrade Insights for Managed Cluster - Warnings Only
